title: rosa tomentella var. leucantha
intro: Rosa tomentella var. leucantha, also known as Rosa leucantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a type of rose known for its fragrant white flowers and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as protect against infections and cell damage. Rosa leucantha can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues.
